2026-03-24.content:
Cloud Router supports named sets in [Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products#product-launch-stages)
for BGP route policies. Named sets are used to group together expressions of
either communities or BGP prefixes, allowing them to be managed or
referenced as a single entity. For more information, see
[BGP route policies overview](https://docs.cloud.google.com/network-connectivity/docs/router/concepts/bgp-route-policies-overview#what-are-bgp-route-policies).

summary.title: Cloud Router Supports Named Sets for BGP Route Policies
summary.summary: Cloud Router now supports named sets for BGP route policies in preview. This feature allows you to group expressions of communities or BGP prefixes, managing them as single entities for easier policy management.
